purpose: Describe the Tau commands used to align one Tau loop with the Loop2 one-node contract.

tau_commands.does: Runs one bounded Tau loop from a Loop2 repair-node contract.
tau_commands.fixture_behavior: For backend=fixture, uses an in-process FakeProvider, writes Loop2 artifacts, runs configured local checks, validates the receipt artifacts, and prints one JSON result.
fixture_proves: six Loop2 artifact files exist and validate
tau_commands.live_delegated_behavior: For backend=scillm with --loop2-src, delegates to the native Loop2 runner after Scillm doctor, materialization, and auth preflight checks. Tau sanitizes persisted native artifacts, writes tau-sanitization.json, validates native artifacts, and prints one JSON result.

tau_commands.does: Checks the four Loop2 monitor surfaces for one Tau receipt run directory.
success_indicators: checked_endpoints contains summary, transport-dag-evidence, events, and events/stream

tau_commands.does: Prints a JSON summary of one Tau Loop2 receipt run directory.

validation_default.meaning: The summary was read but Loop2 contract validation was not run.

validation_option.does: Runs Loop2 contract validation and includes checked artifacts and errors.

tau_commands.does: Validates Tau-emitted Loop2 receipt artifacts against Loop2 contracts and Tau artifact invariants.
Validates artifacts emitted by the native Loop2 runner.
Creates one fixture Tau Loop2 run and checks its artifacts plus monitor surface.

body.prompt: Read the Tau loop-to-Loop2 alignment code. Be blunt. Identify the minimal complete amendment so fixture tau loop2-run works, emits Loop2 artifacts, validates them, and does not add spaghetti. Do not edit. Return: essential files, unnecessary changes, next one patch, and deterministic proof command.

requires_before_use: Do not treat delegate output as proof until local commands validate behavior

scillm_tool_call_request.command: scillm --json --tools experiments/loop2-alignment/scillm_tau_loop2_tools.json --tool-choice auto openai/gpt-5.5 "Which Tau/Loop2 check should run next?"
scillm_tool_call_request.meaning: A non-agent model may propose one of the Tau/Loop2 tool calls. Scillm does not execute it.
caller_responsibilities: validate the returned function name against the tools JSON
record command output and artifact paths as evidence
requires_before_use: scillm tools check passes for the tools JSON
Scillm doctor/auth passes before a live model call

live_evidence.name: live_scillm_opencode_repair
proves: Tau delegated one live Loop2 Scillm/OpenCode repair

live_evidence.name: env_scillm_auth_contract_preparation
proves: Tau can use SCILLM_API_KEY in a temporary execution contract
the source contract is not mutated

live_evidence.name: scillm_auth_preflight
proves: bad Scillm auth fails in Tau before Loop2 runner invocation
good Scillm auth proceeds to a live delegated repair
preflight evidence is included in Tau loop2-run JSON output
